title: agropyron unilaterale
intro: Agropyron unilaterale, also known as unilateral wheat grass or wheat grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the wheat grass family and is native to the Himalayan region. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects, making it beneficial for various health issues. The health benefits of Agropyron unilaterale include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as providing relief from anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of Agropyron unilaterale can be found in the form of juice, supplements, and tea, which can be consumed for its potential health benefits.
